name: desk-panel
description: Reserti Desk Panel — monorepo: backend + admin + staff

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:staff"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:admin && npm run build:staff
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../apps/admin && npm install && cd ../staff && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
